::: {.notion-selectable .notion-text-block data-block-id="17e80852-7b17-80b0-8ff3-cdfcfaa5c7eb" dir="auto" style="width:100%;max-width:1713px;margin-top:1px;margin-bottom:1px"}

::: {.content-editable-leaf-rtl spellcheck="true" placeholder=" " contenteditable="false" data-content-editable-leaf="true" style="max-width:100%;width:100%;white-space:break-spaces;word-break:break-word;caret-color:var(--c-texPri);padding-top:3px;padding-bottom:3px;padding-inline:2px"}
One LLM call generates a response while another provides evaluation and feedback in a loop.
:::

::: {style="position:relative;inset-inline-start:0px"}
:::
:::
:::
